name: HRC_LOADER_STATS
description: This table contains statistics about Fusion data objects used during a data load.

columns.Name: STAT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key

columns.Name: BO_IGNORED_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: Ignored Objects

columns.Name: BO_IGNORED_RECORDS
columns.Comments: Ignored Records

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LOADER_BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies a batch (header)

columns.Name: METADATA_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the corresponding top level object metadata definition

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: BO_CURRENT_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Object current level

columns.Name: BO_LEVEL_NAME
columns.Comments: Object level name

columns.Name: BO_LEVEL_NAME_CONCAT
columns.Comments: Concatenation of object level names separated by a separator

columns.Name: PARENT_STAT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies if parent stat id for this object

columns.Name: BO_TOTAL_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of objects count

columns.Name: BO_SUCCESSFUL_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of successful objects

columns.Name: BO_FAILED_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of failed objects

columns.Name: BO_PENDING_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of pending objects

columns.Name: BO_TOTAL_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of physical  records

columns.Name: BO_SUCCESSFUL_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of successful physical  records

columns.Name: BO_FAILED_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of failed  physical  records

columns.Name: BO_PENDING_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of pending physical  records

columns.Name: IMPEXP_TOTAL_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of import or export objects

columns.Name: IMPEXP_FAILED_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: total number of failed import or export objects

columns.Name: IMPEXP_TOTAL_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of import or export physical records

columns.Name: IMPEXP_FAILED_RECORDS
columns.Comments: total number of import or export failed physical records

columns.Name: BO_CHANGED_OBJECTS
columns.Comments: Changed Objects

columns.Name: BO_CHANGED_RECORDS
columns.Comments: Changed Records

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
